personal.name: Gino Corrales
personal.tagline: Senior Cybersecurity Analyst | IAM Strategist | People Developer at Caterpillar Inc.
personal.about:
Senior Cybersecurity Analyst with a Master's in Management, blending technical expertise in Identity & Access Management (IAM) with a strategic, people-first leadership approach. I specialize in designing secure, scalable IAM solutions that protect enterprise environments while enabling operational efficiency.

Passionate about developing people and building inclusive, high-performing teams, I thrive at the intersection of technology, leadership, and growth. Born from a rich South American cultural background rooted in Peru, I bring a multicultural perspective to everything I do.

experience.company: Gies College of Business - University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign
description: Support and mentor current and prospective GIES students by sharing professional experience and academic insights.
Represent the Gies College of Business community as an advocate for the program.
Lead the Identity Access Management support team, responding to customer issues and strengthening backend processes and services.
Serve as the IAM Change Manager, facilitating internal IAM CAB meetings and participating in enterprise-wide CAB sessions.
Develop concepts and architecture for hardware, software, DBMS, or network upgrades based on operational issues, customer needs, and industry trends.
Provide expert leadership within IAM and counsel on multiple technical specialties to sections and divisions within the I/S Unit.

experience.role: Sr. IT Analyst - Application Support Team Lead - Cybersecurity - IAM
description: Lead the IAM support team and work directly with business partners to coordinate how IAM solutions can drive business success.
Evaluate new software and hardware technology and develop corporate or departmental standards for their use.
Provide project leadership, expert advice, and counsel to IT personnel and management on complex technical environments.
Develop processes and process improvements to provide reliable services across functional lines.

experience.role: IT Analyst III & Application Software Developer - Identity Access Management
description: Served as Quality Team Lead for the corporate identity administration and access request platform IdentityIQ from SailPoint.
Developed implementation, customization, and deployment of SailPoint IdentityIQ.
Supported Active Directory, Global Directory, PKI, LDAP, UnboundID, O365, and WorkDay implementation.
Maintained mission-critical application environments and change management processes.
Trained as an IT Deployment Business Process Analyst for ERP, Inventory Management, Warehousing, and Manufacturing Systems.
Obtained SAP Certified Application Associate - Production, Planning & Manufacturing with SAP ERP 6.0 EHP6.
Led a deployment improvement project with an 8-member team.
Prepared requirement documents, Fit Gap Analysis, and solutions for process data management.

experience.role: Teaching Assistant - IT368.17 Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP)
description: Supported instruction of ERP course covering managerial and technical aspects of enterprise resource planning.
Assisted students in understanding SAP-specific modules and business process reengineering concepts.
Completed eight consecutive internships focused on information technology, systems, and mobile technology.
Led a research team of six interns developing an iPhone application prototype for State Farm Bank.
Actively participated in the first class of the Spanish Bilingual Internship Program.
Researched and developed prototypes including a Leap Motion device application.

education.institution: Gies College of Business - University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign
description: Blended management education with technical cybersecurity expertise.
Served as a GIES Student Ambassador, mentoring fellow and future students.
Focused on software development, systems analysis, and enterprise technology.
Served as Vice President of IT/AITP/ACM Student Chapter and Vice President of ACM Student Chapter.
Studied systems engineering with a foundation in technical problem-solving and software development.
Completed secondary education in Arequipa, Peru, laying the foundation for an international academic and professional career.

Introduction to Finance: The Role of Financial Markets
